programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: With the contestants narrowed down to 32, Don Mann and Randy Couture reveal a new twist that changes the game: a complex point system that turns survival into a strategic battle. Contestants face grueling military training and a brutal 5K run through Nevada’s desert, testing their endurance and mental toughness. As mentors and adversaries, Don and Randy push the contestants to their limits. This episode marks the beginning of an intense journey where only the strongest and most strategic will prevail.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Episode 3 continues with a grueling desert run under Las Vegas’ heat, where endurance is tested to the extreme. As contestants push through, one unexpectedly stands out. They are then trained with cutting-edge weaponry, showcasing their skills on the course of fire. A high-stakes plank competition follows, with only two contestants left standing. Through intense physical and mental challenges, this episode reveals the contestants’ true character and resilience, setting the stage for more survival tests ahead.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: A new team commander emerges, but can they hold the title? Contestants face long-range shooting challenges, mastering both standard artillery and the powerful 50 Caliber rifle. The intensity continues with surprise physical training led by a SEAL Team 6 warrior and MMA Champion, pushing contestants to their breaking point. This episode is a relentless test of endurance, skill, and resilience, as the competition intensifies and only the most determined will claim the title of Ultimate Competition Lead.

programme.title: Surviving Mann

programme.title: Bringing Down The House: The Bombing of Harvey's Casino
programme.desc: In the summer of 1980, two men wheeled what looked like an IBM computer into a Lake Tahoe casino. The events that followed rocked the industry, baffled bomb technicians, and changed the lives of a criminal’s and a casino magnate’s family forever.

programme.title: Heroes On Call: The Forgotten Story of America's First Paramedics
programme.desc: In the 1960s, Americans were dying at shocking rates due to inadequate emergency care. Enter Freedom House Ambulance Service: the first paramedics unit in the U.S., run and staffed by Black men and women. This is the origin story of EMS.

programme.title: Absolutely Albuquerque : Creating Mayhem with a Heavy Metal Fiddler
programme.desc: Amanda joins Sage Cornelius, an Indigenous fiddle player with a love for heavy metal. Watch as they spend the day exploring the city’s rich Vietnamese food scene, an impromptu concert at a favorite local venue, and a bit of supervised mayhem.

programme.title: Blind Kitchen: Re-creating Southern Comfort Classic vs. Elevated American Fusion
programme.desc: It’s a culinary battle of the senses between two iconic chefs in the City Beautiful. Watch as Chef Liz of Garp & Fuss in Winter Park takes on Chef Trina of Se7en Bites in The Milk District. It’s The Knife versus The Whisk!

programme.title: Unbelievable: Rescues From the Brink
programme.desc: Brace yourself for heart-stopping heroics as rescuers leap into action! A semi-truck teeters dangerously over the Ohio River, a devastating gas explosion reduces homes to rubble, and a capsized cargo ship leaves its crew fighting for survival.
